title: [ARCHIVED] Vietnam's Delight
description: An add-on for Farmer's Delight Refabricated that add foods (and other items) from Vietnam.
body:
An add-on for Farmer's Delight Refabricated that add foods (and other items) from Vietnam.

EMI or equivalents is recommended.

**This mod is Fabric only for now. I don't know if porting it to Neo/Forge will be easy since I'm still new to developing mod.**


**Content**
<details>
<summary>1.0:</summary>

![Rice Flour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/071aca9b547c4720d2f2c3b159b84e085537420b.png) Rice Flour: Crafted from Rice by hand or in a Crafting Table, can be used in a variety of ways.

![Corn Starch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed725dbd24bd9f4a5cc4797944adfe111e2cf5e9.png) Corn Starch: When either [Cultural Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cultural-delights-fabric), [Haunted Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/haunted-harvest) or [Corn Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corn-delight-fabric) (or any other mod that use the tag c:seeds/corn), this item will be enabled for crafting. It's only purpose currently is to craft Rice Batter. Making it is the same as Rice Flour, just with corn kernels instead.

**Note**: Corn Delight is not ported to FD Refabricated at the moment

![Rice Mixed Wheat Dough](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/786373c0aa46ffa22f4f821b7a27c46119b7bd12.png) Rice Mixed Wheat Dough: Mixing Water, Wheat and Rice (or Rice Flour) in a Crafting Table to get this dough.

![Banh Mi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecd998f8e70aaa804daef100d128e41d2b35c558.png) Banh Mi: Now plop that dough into a Furnace or Smoker to get the iconic baguette from Vietnam (its name literally means "Bread"....) You can also just craft it with Wheat and Rice (or Rice Flour). More recipe for this item will be added in the future.

![Rice Batter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97b839a586ab208c6345bb2c1dcaf3fcd4ca1b69.png) Rice Batter: Mixing Water, Rice Flour (and Corn Starch if it's enabled) to get this questionably sprited item. 😏

![Rice Noodle Sheet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7d340da834f5ce8372124eba5f38cb9ddcdd678.png) Rice Noodle Sheet: Cook the Rice Batter and you'll get this pretty bland looking disc of gluten.

![Flat Rice Noodle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b38786db1785439f8b3a8076c8ae12f8601cf356.png) Flat Rice Noodle: Use the Cutting Board to turn that sheet into clumps of noodle! Still pretty bland, though.

![Pho](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a0bea002d640fd16f2df1c964d86b52a2de244a.png)![Chicken Pho](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a150d96689748833386ae2faf8c9cfa3a5491886.png)![Beef Pho](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59c3d07676005cbc96cbaa4179f07b6b708c4c8e.png) Pho: Get your hand on some Bones to make Bone Broth then combine it with the noodle from earlier along with some meat and onion to make these fulfilling bowls of Pho.

</details>

This is my first mod so it might be rough around the edge. If you found an issue, want better compatability or have a suggestion, visit the mod's Github and post an issue. Alternatively, you can contact me through my Discord.

You are free to use this mod in your modpack as long as you give proper credit.
